# terrible_community_general_yum_versionlock (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Package name or a list of package names with optional version or wildcards. Specifying versions is supported since community.general 7.2.0.

### Optional

- `state` (String) If state is `present`, package(s) is/are added to yum versionlock list. If state is `absent`, package(s) is/are removed from yum versionlock list.

### Read-Only

- `packages` (String) A list of package(s) in versionlock list.
